check_content_excerpt:
Review the permissions of the Kubernetes config.yaml by using the command:

stat -c %a /var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml

If any of the files are have permissions more permissive than "644", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Change the permissions of the config.yaml to "644" by executing the command:

chmod 644 /var/lib/kubelet/config.yaml
title: The Kubernetes kubelet config must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
